_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to plan, brief, execute, and debrief a mission
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.469), AI-T-008 (AI, cosine: 0.463).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.357). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, brief, debrief, execute, mission, plan] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.874, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ability to plan, brief, execute, and debrief a mission" and "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.478 > STS 0.357 (gap +0.121). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, brief, debrief, execute, mission, plan]. WIDAI terms: [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing].
